query:
INSERT INTO events ( title, slug, description, content_html, images, external_link, start_date, end_date, location, price, status, featured, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( 'Heart Coherence Workshop with Sonja Bloder', 'heart-coherence-workshop', 'Align Your Heart, Mind & Emotions. An immersive 2-hour experiential workshop through somatic movement, conscious breathwork, and mantra practices. Cultivate inner calm and clarity amidst stress and overwhelm.', '

This session will be held in ENGLISH

What is Heart Coherence?

Heart coherence is a measurable state of physiological and emotional alignment in which the rhythms of the heart, nervous system, and brain come into harmony.

Benefits

  • ✓Cultivate inner calm and clarity amidst stress
  • ✓Strengthen the heart-mind connection
', '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506126613408-eca07ce68773?w=1200\"]', 'https://reservas.cancagua.cl/cancaguaspa/s/17d02af1-495c-426e-b42b-981495b85b77', '2026-01-17 10:00:00', '2026-01-17 12:00:00', 'Cancagua Spa, Puerto Varas', NULL, 'active', 1, NOW(), NOW() );
